summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and does not allow merge, fix, or raise-pr actions. Three open non-security PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review items, and the two validator-identified security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling. No close-style action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR awaiting maintainer review; no duplicate/superseding evidence in this inventory shard.
Independent feature PR with check risk; not closable or mergeable under this plan-mode inventory job.
Exact PR ref is validator-identified as security-sensitive; route read-only to central security handling.
